title: montia dichotoma
intro: Montia dichotoma, also known as the watercress dock or Minnesota watercress, is a perennial aquatic plant species native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, attributed to the presence of compounds such as saponins and flavonoids. Montia dichotoma is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Montia dichotoma can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in salads and as a cooking green.
